subprograms.name: Count
subprograms.code:
function Count
  (Source   : in AVR_String;
   Pattern  : in AVR_String)
   return     Unsigned_8

subprograms.name: Count
subprograms.code:
function Count
  (Source   : in AVR_String;
   Pattern  : in Character)
  return     Unsigned_8

subprograms.name: Index
Index
Index_Non_Blank
subprograms.code:
function Index_Non_Blank
  (Source : in AVR_String;
   Going  : in Direction := Forward)
  return   Unsigned_8
